hero.title: The strategic fight is shifting from who has the best model to who owns the workflow around it.
hero.lede: Assess where strategic value is concentrating as model quality converges. As raw model capability converges, the battle for value is moving up the stack toward workflow ownership, context capture, and distribution.
hero.signal: Distribution is carrying more strategic weight as raw model differentiation narrows.
hero.thesis: As raw model capability converges, the battle for value is moving up the stack toward workflow ownership, context capture, and distribution.
hero.promise: Esta edición ayuda a executives and operators a ubicar dónde se está moviendo la ventaja y qué decisión exige.
hero.tension: Some categories will still reward raw model leadership more than distribution depth.

topLine.title: Distribution is becoming as important as the model.
topLine.body: As raw model capability converges, the battle for value is moving up the stack toward workflow ownership, context capture, and distribution. Owning the user relationship becomes economically more important. Memory and workflow embedding can become part of the moat. Efecto de segundo orden: Go-to-market strength can compound technical capability rather than merely follow it. Pregunta a vigilar: Which layer keeps the recurring user relationship as model access broadens?
topLine.stakes: Switching costs may rise at the interface layer rather than the model layer.

items.label: Distribution
items.text: Distribution is carrying more strategic weight as raw model differentiation narrows.

items.label: Workflow
items.text: Context capture is emerging as the scarcer asset than inference alone.

items.label: Product
items.text: Interface design is increasingly shaping product economics, not just usability.

items.title: 1. Distribution is carrying more strategic weight as raw model differentiation narrows
items.body: Mecanismo: Multiple product and buyer signals point toward packaging, workflow integration, and reach becoming more decisive than standalone model access. Por qué importa: Owning the user relationship becomes economically more important. Efecto de segundo orden: Go-to-market strength can compound technical capability rather than merely follow it. Tensión a vigilar: Frontier model gaps can still matter in narrow, high-stakes domains.
items.claim: Distribution is carrying more strategic weight as raw model differentiation narrows.
items.explanation: Multiple product and buyer signals point toward packaging, workflow integration, and reach becoming more decisive than standalone model access.
items.implication: Owning the user relationship becomes economically more important.

items.title: 2. Context capture is emerging as the scarcer asset than inference alone
items.body: Mecanismo: Embedded systems that learn user habits and store reusable context are harder to displace than point solutions that only answer prompts. Por qué importa: Memory and workflow embedding can become part of the moat. Efecto de segundo orden: Switching costs may rise at the interface layer rather than the model layer.
items.claim: Context capture is emerging as the scarcer asset than inference alone.
items.explanation: Embedded systems that learn user habits and store reusable context are harder to displace than point solutions that only answer prompts.
items.implication: Memory and workflow embedding can become part of the moat.

items.title: 3. Interface design is increasingly shaping product economics, not just usability
items.body: Mecanismo: The interface determines what gets repeated, measured, remembered, and eventually monetized. Por qué importa: The presentation surface influences retention and monetization. Efecto de segundo orden: UI decisions can determine where strategic capture lands.
items.claim: Interface design is increasingly shaping product economics, not just usability.
items.explanation: The interface determines what gets repeated, measured, remembered, and eventually monetized.
items.implication: The presentation surface influences retention and monetization.

marketMap.title: Mapa de poder: dónde se mueve la ventaja

items.label: Ganan poder
items.text: Operadores con acceso creíble a capacidad: chips, energía, data centers, redes y equipos capaces de orquestar inferencia a costo controlado.
items.powerShift: Owning the user relationship becomes economically more important.

items.label: Quedan presionados
items.text: Compradores y vendors que trataban la nube como una abstracción neutral; ahora deben justificar dependencia, jurisdicción y continuidad operacional.
items.powerShift: Switching costs may rise at the interface layer rather than the model layer.

items.label: Se abre oportunidad
items.text: Perfiles puente —software, infraestructura, riesgo y finanzas— que puedan traducir ambición de IA en arquitectura, procurement y unit economics.
items.powerShift: UI decisions can determine where strategic capture lands.

reusableLesson.title: Lección reutilizable
reusableLesson.pattern: Cuando una capacidad base se vuelve commodity, la ventaja migra hacia quien controla la restricción escasa: capacidad, continuidad, regulación, distribución o contexto no portable.
applyWhen: workflow control is a strategic surface.
context accumulates where users return daily.
reusableLesson.takeaway: Owning the user relationship becomes economically more important.

items.text: Which layer captures the recurring user relationship?
What kinds of context become least portable over time?
Which products turn occasional use into operational dependency?
Which layer keeps the recurring user relationship as model access broadens?
Where will the most valuable non-portable context accumulate?

items.headline: Qué cambia para software-engineer
items.body: Para un software engineer, la ventaja es diseñar con restricciones reales: costo de inferencia, latencia, capacidad disponible, soberanía y continuidad operacional.

items.headline: Qué cambia para founder
items.body: Para un founder, la ventaja es convertir infraestructura confiable en promesa comercial: no vender magia de IA, sino capacidad repetible con unit economics defendibles.

items.headline: Qué cambia para operator
items.body: Para un operator, la ventaja es comprar y gobernar IA como sistema crítico: vendor risk, jurisdicción, presupuesto, SLAs y dependencia operacional.
